name: std-notes
description: Notes: Notion-style personal hierarchical notes with rich-text content, page tree, search, and favorites. Pick for personal/lightweight notes (vs std-wiki for collaborative team KB).

emits.description: Fired when the BrowseItem collection finishes loading; payload.data holds the (possibly paginated) slice and totalCount holds the unsliced filter total. totalCount is optional so compiled-path emitters that haven't been migrated yet still validate
